title: Harpy Express | Translations
body:
## This language pack adds Ukrainian, German, and ~~Russian~~ translations 
To the TrainMurderyMystery mod (also known as HarpyExpress) by doctor4t.

Features

- Ukrainian (UA) translation support
- German (DE) translation support
- ~~Russian (RU) translation support~~

Credits

- Mod Developer: doctor4t
- Translation: azuban


This resource pack will receive updates to improve translations, fix bugs.
